fileSummary: This document set describes four key aspects of an AI agent or simulation system: the application of Bayesian theory to LLMs and prompt engineering, precise instructions for memory extraction from AI chat contexts, a comprehensive technical specification for the Perchance AI Chat platform, and the detailed architecture of the RPGlitch Somatic Psychology & Trauma Engine (SPTE).

functionSummaries.bayes-prompt-engineering.md: Introductio: Introduces the fundamental principle of Bayes' Theorem.
functionSummaries.bayes-prompt-engineering.md: Mathematica: Lays out the basic and extended formulas of Bayes' Theorem and defines key concepts.
functionSummaries.bayes-prompt-engineering.md: Bayes’ Theo: Explores the theoretical foundations connecting LLMs to Bayesian inference, including next-token prediction and in-context learning.
functionSummaries.bayes-prompt-engineering.md: Application: Details how Bayesian principles can be applied to design effective prompts, including prior specification, evidence presentation, and encouraging probabilistic reasoning.
functionSummaries.bayes-prompt-engineering.md: Context Eng: Discusses context engineering from a Bayesian perspective, covering information ordering, context window optimization, and dynamic context adaptation.
functionSummaries.bayes-prompt-engineering.md: Practical I: Provides concrete strategies for Bayesian few-shot learning, uncertainty-aware prompting, multi-step reasoning, and meta-cognitive prompting.
functionSummaries.bayes-prompt-engineering.md: Case Studie: Illustrates the application of Bayesian principles in medical diagnosis, scientific literature review, and business decision support.
functionSummaries.bayes-prompt-engineering.md: Future Dire: Explores emerging trends, open research questions, and technical challenges in integrating Bayesian methods with LLMs.
functionSummaries.memory-idea.md: INSTRUCTIONS: Provides detailed rules for memory extraction, including what to extract, formatting, and what to avoid.
functionSummaries.memory-idea.md: WHAT TO EXTRACT: Lists categories of information considered significant for memory extraction.
functionSummaries.memory-idea.md: DO NOT EXTRACT: Lists categories of information that should be ignored during memory extraction.
functionSummaries.perchance-ai-chat.md: oc.thread.on(): Attaches event handlers to thread events.
functionSummaries.perchance-ai-chat.md: oc.messageRenderin: Adds a function to the message rendering pipeline.
functionSummaries.perchance-ai-chat.md: oc.generateText(): Generates text using the AI model.
functionSummaries.perchance-ai-chat.md: oc.textToImage(): Generates an image from a prompt.
functionSummaries.perchance-ai-chat.md: oc.window.show(): Shows the custom code iframe UI.
functionSummaries.perchance-ai-chat.md: oc.window.hide(): Hides the custom code iframe UI.
functionSummaries.perchance-ai-chat.md: addBackgroundToEle: Manages ambient media crossfading by pre-loading assets.
functionSummaries.perchance-ai-chat.md: evaluatePerchanceT: Runs custom user code securely in a sandboxed iframe.
functionSummaries.perchance-ai-chat.md: jsonToBlob(): Manually serializes JSON data into a Uint8Array to bypass string length limits during export.
functionSummaries.perchance-ai-chat.md: uploadDataUrlToTex: Compresses and downscales uploaded images before saving.
functionSummaries.perchance-ai-chat.md: applyCodeMirror5To: Dynamically injects CodeMirror for syntax highlighting in textareas.
functionSummaries.perchance-ai-chat.md: addHorizontalSwipe: Allows users to swipe horizontally on chat messages to trigger actions like regenerating messages.
functionSummaries.somatic-psychology-engine.md: Pacing Ada: Describes how user input pacing influences the character's internal processing style and resource decay.
functionSummaries.somatic-psychology-engine.md: Cognitive: Explains how linguistic styling is modulated dynamically based on resource and belief thresholds.
functionSummaries.somatic-psychology-engine.md: The Naivet: Details how baseline credulity and persuasive user inputs calibrate an NPC's trust.
functionSummaries.somatic-psychology-engine.md: Stress Acc: Describes how accumulating stress affects a character's cognitive function, leading to tunnel vision, regulation failure, and memory fragmentation.
functionSummaries.somatic-psychology-engine.md: Trauma Cas: Explains how specific environmental or linguistic cues trigger sudden, non-linear overrides of a character's normal goal hierarchy.
functionSummaries.somatic-psychology-engine.md: Bayesian A: Details how attachment styles seed a Bayesian belief system that governs character expectations and dynamically recalculates goal priorities.
functionSummaries.somatic-psychology-engine.md: The Somati: Outlines how internal states are mapped to observable physical tells and dialogue patterns to 'show, don't tell' character variables.
functionSummaries.somatic-psychology-engine.md: Masking vs: Describes how characters employ conscious social masks while involuntary physical tells betray underlying tension when goals conflict.
functionSummaries.somatic-psychology-engine.md: Perception: Defines strict physical and informational boundaries, preventing mind-reading and enforcing that knowledge must travel via explicit vectors.
functionSummaries.somatic-psychology-engine.md: Kinetic Ha: Explains how prose pacing encourages active player agency by ceding the resolution of high-stakes actions and ensuring every turn ends with an active, forward-driving hook.

classSummaries.perchance-ai-chat.md: oc.character: Defines properties for a character, including name, avatar, role instructions, and custom data.
classSummaries.perchance-ai-chat.md: oc.thread: Defines properties for a chat thread, including messages, character overrides, and custom data.

languageNotes: The documents use a mix of markdown for conceptual explanations and instructions, and implicitly reference JavaScript for `oc` API calls and client-side logic in the Perchance specification. The RPGlitch document also uses mathematical notation for probability and XML-like structures for configuration.
